data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191A82: MR. BRINEY: Hold on, lass!\nWait up, PEEKO!
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191AAD:
Hm? You're {PLAYER}{KUN}!
You saved my darling PEEKO!\lWe owe so much to you!\pWhat's that?
You want to sail with me?\pHmhm...\pYou have a LETTER bound for DEWFORD
and a package for SLATEPORT, then?\pQuite the busy life you must lead!\pBut, certainly, what you're asking is
no problem at all.\pYou've come to the right man!
We'll set sail for DEWFORD.
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191BFD: MR. BRINEY: DEWFORD, here we come!\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191C57: MR. BRINEY: Is that so?\nYour deliveries can wait?\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail!
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191CC3:
MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!
I know exactly what you want to say!\pYou're to deliver a LETTER to DEWFORD
and a package to SLATEPORT.\pWhat you need me to do is no problem
at all - I'm the man for the job!\pFirst, we'll set sail for DEWFORD.
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191DA6:
MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!
I know exactly what you want to say!\pYou're to deliver a package to
CAPT. STERN in SLATEPORT.\pWhat you need me to do is no problem
at all - I'm the man for the job!\pFirst, we'll set sail for DEWFORD.
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191E80: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nFor you, I'll go out to sea anytime!\pNow, my friend, where are we bound?
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191EDB: MR. BRINEY: Is that so?\nWell, PEEKO owes her life to you.\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail!
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.UnknownString_8191F4F: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nWe've made land in PETALBURG!\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail!
